notebooks.title: Understanding (linear) functions
notebooks.description: I have prepared this Marimo Notebook to help my 14 years old son understand the concept of functions in general and linear functions in particular.

notebooks.title: Comparing Objects: From Length to Surface Area and Beyond
notebooks.description: This notebook is intended to clarify concepts like "length", "surface area", and "volume" for 5th grade schoolers. It is designed to be used by parents and children together, with the goal of helping children understand these concepts in a fun and engaging way.

notebooks.title: Statistical Analysis of Experimental Data
notebooks.description: This notebook demonstrates how to analyze experimental data using basic statistical methods. We'll work through an example to show the practical steps involved in exploring data, assessing distributions, and ranking samples based on multiple parameters.
